auth.credentialAlreadyInUse: Cet identifiant est déjà lié à un autre compte.

auth.actionSignOutFailed: Impossible de se déconnecter pour le moment.
auth.actionSessionRestoreFailed: Impossible de restaurer votre session. Veuillez vous reconnecter.

testimonials.quote: Finally know when I'm working Christmas. Changed my life.

testimonials.quote: Showed my wife my whole year roster in under a minute.

testimonials.quote: Booked flights 3 months out without calling HR once.
testimonials.author: Jason M., Mine worker — 7/7 FIFO
